description: Tests that prototype builds throwaway code to answer one question, kept out of production paths until validated

tests.prompt: Jag vill testa en ny scan-strategi utan att riskera produktionen.
tests.expected_output_description: Builds a throwaway prototype in isolation, one command to run, deletes or absorbs when done

assertions.check: Output recommends building in a new throwaway file/module rather than editing app.py or scanner.py directly
Output frames the prototype as answering a specific question
Output mentions it should be runnable with a single command
Output mentions deleting or absorbing the prototype once it has answered the question

tests.prompt: Jag har en idé om en ny UI-komponent.
tests.expected_output_description: Routes to the UI branch — several variations on one route, throwaway

assertions.check: Output recommends building it as throwaway code separate from production
Output mentions exploring multiple design variations or switching between them
Output advises skipping polish (no tests, no abstractions) for a prototype
